name: claude-code-mirror
description: Rich chat UI for Claude Code - multiple tabs, model selection, file sending, image paste, and more

claudeMirror.cliPath.description: Path to the Claude CLI executable

claudeMirror.codex.cliPath.description: Path to the Codex CLI executable

claudeMirror.codex.model.description: Codex model to use for new Codex sessions. Leave empty to use the CLI/config default.

enumDescriptions: Use Codex CLI/config default reasoning effort
Extra high reasoning effort (maximum depth, slower)
claudeMirror.codex.reasoningEffort.description: Codex reasoning effort for new turns. Leave empty to use the CLI/config default.

claudeMirror.useCtrlEnterToSend.description: Use Ctrl+Enter to send messages (Enter adds newline)

claudeMirror.chatFontSize.description: Font size (px) for chat messages in the webview

claudeMirror.chatFontFamily.description: Font family for chat messages. Leave empty to use VS Code default. For Hebrew, try: 'Segoe UI', 'David', 'Arial'

enumDescriptions: Terminal Hacker - Green on black with typewriter-style streaming
Retro - Pixel-inspired typography with CRT scanline atmosphere
Zen - Minimal styling with calm, soft animations
claudeMirror.typingTheme.description: Visual personality theme for response rendering in the chat webview.

claudeMirror.autoNameSessions.description: Automatically generate session tab names from the first message using Claude Haiku

claudeMirror.activitySummary.description: Periodically summarize Claude's activity in the tab title using Haiku

claudeMirror.activitySummaryThreshold.description: Number of tool uses before triggering an activity summary

claudeMirror.model.description: Claude model to use for new sessions. Leave empty to use CLI default.

enumDescriptions: Full Access - All tools run without approval
Supervised - Only read-only tools allowed; write tools are denied
claudeMirror.permissionMode.description: Permission mode for Claude sessions. Changes take effect on next session start.

claudeMirror.enableFileLogging.description: Write logs to disk files in addition to the Output Channel. Each session tab gets its own log file.

claudeMirror.logDirectory.description: Directory for log files. Leave empty to use the extension's default storage location.

claudeMirror.gitPush.enabled.description: Whether git push is configured and ready to use via the Git button

claudeMirror.gitPush.scriptPath.description: Path to the git push script (relative to workspace root)

claudeMirror.gitPush.commitMessageTempla.description: Commit message template. Use {sessionName} for the current tab name.

claudeMirror.translationLanguage.description: Target language for the Translate button on assistant messages

claudeMirror.sessionVitals.description: Show Session Vitals dashboard (timeline minimap, weather widget, cost heat bar, turn intensity borders)

claudeMirror.adventureWidget.description: Show the Adventure Widget - a pixel-art dungeon crawler that visualizes Claude's tool activity as a roguelike adventure

enumDescriptions: Haiku - fastest and cheapest, good for quick summaries (recommended)
Sonnet - higher quality analysis, moderate cost
Opus - highest quality, slower and more expensive
claudeMirror.analysisModel.description: Model used for background analysis: session naming, activity summaries, and semantic turn analysis

claudeMirror.promptEnhancer.autoEnhance.description: Automatically enhance prompts before sending them to Claude

enumDescriptions: Sonnet 4.6 - good balance of quality and speed (recommended)

claudeMirror.turnAnalysis.enabled.description: Enable background semantic analysis for dashboard insights (adds extra Claude calls)

claudeMirror.turnAnalysis.maxPerSession.description: Maximum number of semantic analysis calls per session tab

claudeMirror.turnAnalysis.timeoutMs.description: Timeout for a single semantic analysis call

claudeMirror.achievements.enabled.description: Enable the achievements system (XP, badges, goals, and recap). When disabled, all achievement UI and tracking are hidden.

claudeMirror.achievements.sound.description: Play short sound effects for achievement toasts.

claudeMirror.achievements.aiInsight.description: Enable AI-powered session insights at the end of each session (once per day). Uses Claude Sonnet for deeper analysis of your coding patterns.

claudeMirror.achievements.githubSync.description: Automatically sync achievements to a public GitHub Gist after each session. Enables the Community feature for sharing and comparing achievements with other developers.

claudeMirror.achievements.githubOAuthCli.description: GitHub OAuth App client ID for browser-based GitHub sign-in (Device Flow) used by Community sharing. Request only the gist scope. Can be overridden for custom/self-hosted OAuth apps. Leave empty to use PAT fallback.

claudeMirror.srPtdAutoInject.description: Automatically inject SR-PTD documentation instructions into the project CLAUDE.md and install the sr-ptd-skill

claudeMirror.skillGen.enabled.description: Enable automatic skill generation from SR-PTD documents

claudeMirror.skillGen.threshold.description: Number of new documents before triggering skill generation

claudeMirror.skillGen.docsDirectory.description: Directory containing SR-PTD documents (source documents for skill generation)

claudeMirror.skillGen.docsPattern.description: Glob pattern for matching SR-PTD document files

claudeMirror.skillGen.skillsDirectory.description: Target directory to install generated skills. Leave empty to use ~/.claude/skills/

claudeMirror.skillGen.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable for running the skill generation pipeline

claudeMirror.skillGen.toolkitPath.description: Path to the Python skill generation toolkit directory

claudeMirror.skillGen.workspaceDir.description: Isolated workspace directory for pipeline artifacts (extractions, clusters, skills_out). Leave empty for auto.

enumDescriptions: Python API - direct module import (most controlled)
create_skills.py - MVP/debug only (no resume, per-phase timeout)
claudeMirror.skillGen.pipelineMode.description: How to invoke the Python skill generation pipeline

claudeMirror.skillGen.autoRun.description: Automatically run skill generation when document threshold is reached. If false, only shows a notification.

claudeMirror.skillGen.timeoutMs.description: Maximum pipeline run time in milliseconds (default: 10 minutes)

claudeMirror.skillGen.aiDeduplication.description: Use AI (Claude Sonnet) for ambiguous skill deduplication decisions
